name: Sarah Elfreth
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $4,980,286 for Sarah Elfreth in U.S. House, MD-03. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $4,980,286.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
